articles.title: Six people stabbed in London after Arsenal’s victory parade
articles.description: Met says non-fatal stabbings took place after most of the crowds had dispersed on Sunday evening Six people were stabbed after Arsenal’s Premier League victory parade in north London on Sunday, police have said.
